theme: Mixer #120 — Best Way to Learn English

sentences.english: The best way to learn English is to go and live in an English country, take English lessons and get lots of English friends.
sentences.korean: 영어를 배우는 가장 좋은 방법은 영어권 나라에 가서 살고, 수업을 듣고, 영어 친구를 많이 사귀는 거예요.

sentences.english: Failing that, you just have to put in a lot of time and a lot of practice.
sentences.korean: 그게 안 되면 많은 시간과 연습을 투자해야 해요.

sentences.english: I learnt a lot of Spanish by having a Spanish boyfriend, so I would recommend a close relationship with someone who speaks the language you want to learn.
sentences.korean: 스페인어 남자친구 덕에 스페인어를 많이 배웠어요. 그래서 배우고 싶은 언어를 하는 사람과 가까운 관계를 추천해요.

sentences.english: I think the best way is probably to vary the learning methods.
sentences.korean: 가장 좋은 방법은 읽기, 말하기, 쓰기, 듣기를 조금씩 다양하게 하는 거예요.

sentences.english: Do a little reading, a little speaking, a little writing, and a little listening.
sentences.korean: / 읽기, 말하기, 쓰기, 듣기를 조금씩 하라.

sentences.english: The best way to learn English is to make lots of friends who speak English.
sentences.korean: 영어를 배우는 가장 좋은 방법은 영어를 하는 친구를 많이 사귀는 거예요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Mixer #120 — Best Way to Learn English
